cards.back: v. 放弃；遗弃；抛弃
cards.hint: a(加强)+band(绑)+on→不再绑住→放弃
cards.example: The crew had to abandon the sinking ship immediately.

cards.back: v. 废除（制度、法律等）
cards.hint: a(否定)+bol(球)+ish→把球打掉→彻底废除
cards.example: Many countries have abolished the death penalty.

cards.back: adj. 抽象的；n. 摘要；v. 提取
cards.hint: abs(离开)+tract(拉)→从具体事物中拉离→抽象
cards.example: The professor presented an abstract theory about consciousness.

cards.back: v. 加速；促进
cards.hint: ac(加强)+celer(速度)+ate→加快速度
cards.example: Climate change accelerates the melting of polar ice caps.

cards.back: v. 容纳；适应；为…提供住宿
cards.hint: ac+commoda(方便)→使之方便→容纳、适应
cards.example: The hotel can accommodate up to 500 guests.

cards.back: v. 积累；积聚
cards.hint: ac(加强)+cumul(堆)+ate→不断堆积→积累
cards.example: She accumulated years of research experience before writing her thesis.

cards.back: adj. 准确的；精确的
cards.hint: ac(加强)+cur(关心)+ate→用心关注→精准
cards.example: The weather forecast was surprisingly accurate this week.

cards.back: v. 承认；致谢；确认收到
cards.hint: ac(朝向)+knowledge(知识)→向知识靠近→承认
cards.example: The scientist acknowledged the limitations of her study.

cards.back: v. 获得；习得；取得
cards.hint: ac(加强)+quire(寻求)→努力寻求→获得
cards.example: Children acquire language skills naturally through exposure.

cards.back: adj. 足够的；充分的；合格的
cards.hint: ad(朝)+equ(相等)+ate→达到相等水平→足够
cards.example: The study found that most students lacked adequate sleep.

cards.back: adj. 邻近的；毗连的
cards.hint: ad(靠近)+jac(躺)+ent→躺在旁边的→邻近
cards.example: The library is adjacent to the science building.

cards.back: v. 提倡，主张；n. 倡导者，辩护人
cards.hint: ad(朝)+voc(声音)+ate→为某事发声→倡导
cards.example: She advocates for stricter environmental regulations.

cards.back: adj. 审美的；美学的；n. 美感
cards.hint: aesth(感觉)+etic→感受美的→审美
cards.example: The architect's aesthetic choices were both bold and harmonious.

cards.back: v. 聚集；汇总；adj. 总计的；n. 总量
cards.hint: ag(加强)+greg(群体)+ate→聚成群体→汇总
cards.example: The aggregate data shows a clear upward trend.

cards.back: adj. 积极进取的；侵略性的；好斗的
cards.hint: ag(朝)+gress(走)+ive→主动走向→进攻性的
cards.example: The company adopted an aggressive marketing strategy.

cards.back: n. 寓言；讽喻；象征性叙述
cards.hint: alleg(别的)+ory→用别的东西来说→寓言
cards.example: Animal Farm is a famous allegory about political corruption.

cards.back: v. 减轻；缓和（痛苦、问题）
cards.hint: al+levi(轻)+ate→使变轻→减轻
cards.example: Regular exercise can alleviate symptoms of depression.

cards.back: adj. 模糊的；含混的；有歧义的
cards.hint: ambi(两者)+gu(走)+ous→往两个方向走→含混不清
cards.example: The contract contained several ambiguous clauses.

cards.back: v. 放大；扩大；详述
cards.hint: ampl(大)+ify(使)→使变大→放大
cards.example: The microphone amplifies the speaker's voice throughout the hall.

cards.back: adj. 类似的；相似的；类比的
cards.hint: ana(按照)+log(逻辑)+ous→按同样逻辑→类似的
cards.example: The human brain is analogous to a computer in some ways.

cards.back: adj. 分析的；善于分析的
cards.hint: ana(分开)+lyt(解)+ical→分解开来→分析的
cards.example: TOEFL requires strong analytical reading skills.

cards.back: v. 预期；期待；提前考虑
cards.hint: anti(提前)+cip(抓)+ate→提前抓住→预期
cards.example: Researchers anticipate significant breakthroughs in the next decade.

cards.back: adj. 任意的；武断的；专制的
cards.hint: arbitr(仲裁者)+ary→仲裁者说了算→任意武断
cards.example: The decision seemed arbitrary and lacked a clear rationale.

cards.back: v. 清晰表达；adj. 表达清晰的；有关节的
cards.hint: articul(关节)+ate→一节一节讲清楚→清晰表达
cards.example: She was able to articulate her ideas with great clarity.

cards.back: v. 吸收；同化；消化（知识）
cards.hint: as(朝)+simil(相似)+ate→使变得相似→同化吸收
cards.example: Immigrants often struggle to assimilate into a new culture.

cards.back: v. 归因于；n. 特征；属性
cards.hint: at(朝)+tribute(给予)→朝某处给予→归因
cards.example: Scientists attribute the warming trend to greenhouse gas emissions.

cards.back: adj. 真实的；真正的；可信的
cards.hint: auth(自身)+ent+ic→本身的→真实的
cards.example: The museum displays an authentic painting by Van Gogh.

cards.back: adj. 自治的；自主的；独立的
cards.hint: auto(自己)+nom(法律)+ous→自己制定法律→自治
cards.example: The region has been granted autonomous status.

cards.back: adj. 仁慈的；慈善的；善意的
cards.hint: bene(好)+vol(意愿)+ent→有好意愿→仁慈
cards.example: The benevolent donor funded an entire school library.

cards.back: n. 偏见；偏向；v. 使有偏见
cards.hint: bi(两)+as→只走一边→偏见
cards.example: Media bias can distort public perception of events.

cards.back: adj. 天体的；天上的；神圣的
cards.hint: celest(天空)+ial→天空的→天体的
cards.example: Astronomers track the movement of celestial bodies.

cards.back: adj. 连贯的；一致的；清晰易懂的
cards.hint: co(共同)+her(粘住)+ent→粘在一起→连贯
cards.example: A coherent argument requires clear logical structure.

cards.back: v. 补偿；赔偿；弥补
cards.hint: com(共同)+pens(称重)+ate→重新称平→补偿
cards.example: Extra pay can compensate workers for overtime hours.

cards.back: v. 强迫；迫使；驱使
cards.hint: com(加强)+pel(推)→用力推→强迫
cards.example: The evidence compelled the jury to reach a guilty verdict.

cards.back: v. 承认（失败/错误）；退让；让步
cards.hint: con(共同)+cede(走开)→一起走开→让步承认
cards.example: He conceded that his initial data analysis was flawed.

cards.back: v. 构想；设想；怀孕
cards.hint: con(加强)+ceive(抓取)→在脑中抓住→构想
cards.example: Darwin conceived his theory of evolution over many years.

cards.back: v. 思考；考虑；沉思
cards.hint: con(共同)+templ(神庙)+ate→在神庙冥想→沉思
cards.example: She paused to contemplate the implications of her research.

cards.back: v. 与…矛盾；反驳；否认
cards.hint: contra(反对)+dict(说)→反着说→矛盾，反驳
cards.example: The new evidence contradicts the original hypothesis.

cards.back: n. 争议；争论；论战
cards.hint: contro(反对)+vers(转)+y→反方转过来→争议
cards.example: The policy sparked considerable controversy among experts.

cards.back: adj. 传统的；惯例的；常规的
cards.hint: convent(集会共识)+ional→大家达成共识的→传统惯例
cards.example: She challenged conventional thinking in her field.

cards.back: v. 使相关联；n. 相关物；adj. 相关的
cards.hint: cor(共同)+relate(关联)→共同关联→相关
cards.example: Income levels often correlate with educational attainment.

cards.back: n. 对应的人/物；副本；对等物
cards.hint: counter(对面)+part(部分)→对面那部分→对应物
cards.example: The CEO met with his counterpart at the rival firm.

cards.back: adj. 关键的；决定性的；至关重要的
cards.hint: cruc(十字路口)+ial→十字路口→关键时刻
cards.example: Early childhood education is crucial for cognitive development.

cards.back: v. 培养；耕种；陶冶
cards.hint: cultiv(耕)+ate→耕种→培养
cards.example: Reading widely helps cultivate critical thinking skills.

cards.back: v. 描绘；描述；刻画
cards.hint: de(完全)+pict(画)→完全画出→描绘
cards.example: The novel vividly depicts life in 19th-century London.

cards.back: v. 源自；获得；推导出
cards.hint: de(从)+rive(河流)→从河流引出→源自
cards.example: Many English words derive from Latin or Greek roots.

cards.back: v. 偏离；背离（标准/路线）
cards.hint: de(离开)+via(路)+ate→离开路→偏离
cards.example: The pilot had to deviate from the flight path to avoid the storm.

cards.back: v. 减少；缩小；降低（价值/权威）
cards.hint: di(分)+min(小)+ish→变得越来越小→减少
cards.example: Overuse of antibiotics can diminish their effectiveness.

cards.back: v. 分散；驱散；散布
cards.hint: dis(分开)+perse(散)→分散开→驱散
cards.example: Seeds are dispersed by wind, water, or animals.

cards.back: v. 扭曲；歪曲；使变形
cards.hint: dis(偏离)+tort(扭转)→扭转偏离→扭曲
cards.example: Sensational headlines often distort the facts.

cards.back: adj. 多样的；多元的；不同的
cards.hint: di(不同)+verse(转)→朝不同方向转→多样的
cards.example: The city has a diverse population from many cultural backgrounds.

cards.back: adj. 占主导的；支配的；显性的
cards.hint: domin(主人)+ant→主人的特质→占主导
cards.example: English has become the dominant language in global business.

cards.back: v. 详细阐述；adj. 精心制作的；复杂的
cards.hint: e(出)+labor(劳动)+ate→用力做出来→精心制作
cards.example: Could you elaborate on your research methodology?

cards.back: adj. 雄辩的；有口才的；表达有力的
cards.hint: e(出)+loqu(说)+ent→流畅说出→雄辩
cards.example: The senator gave an eloquent speech on civil rights.

cards.back: adj. 经验的；以实证为据的；实验的
cards.hint: empir(经验)+ical→来自经验的→实证的
cards.example: The theory is supported by empirical evidence from multiple studies.

cards.back: v. 支持；认可；背书；（在背面）签名
cards.hint: en+dorse(背面)→在背面签名→认可支持
cards.example: The organization endorsed the new climate agreement.

cards.back: adj. 等同的；相当的；n. 等同物
cards.hint: equi(相等)+val(价值)+ent→价值相等→等同
cards.example: One mile is roughly equivalent to 1.6 kilometers.

cards.back: v. 评估；评价；估算
cards.hint: e(出)+valu(价值)+ate→算出价值→评估
cards.example: Teachers evaluate student performance through multiple assessments.

cards.back: v. 进化；逐渐发展；演变
cards.hint: e(出)+volve(滚动)→滚动发展→进化演变
cards.example: Languages evolve over time to reflect cultural changes.

cards.back: n. 摘录；节选；v. 摘录
cards.hint: ex(出)+cerpt(摘取)→从中摘出→节选
cards.example: The teacher read an excerpt from the novel to the class.

cards.back: v. 展示；表现出；n. 展览品；展览
cards.hint: ex(出)+hibit(持有)→持出展示→展示
cards.example: The patient began to exhibit symptoms of the disease.

cards.back: adj. 明确的；清晰的；直言不讳的
cards.hint: ex(出)+plic(折叠)+it→完全展开→明确清晰
cards.example: The instructions must be explicit to avoid any confusion.

cards.back: v. 促进；使便利；帮助推动
cards.hint: facil(容易)+itate→使变容易→促进
cards.example: Technology facilitates communication across long distances.

cards.back: adj. 基本的；根本的；n. 基本原则
cards.hint: fund(基础)+amental→基础的→根本的
cards.example: Clean water is a fundamental human right.

cards.back: v. 产生；生成；引起
cards.hint: gener(产生)+ate→产生出来→生成
cards.example: Solar panels generate electricity from sunlight.

cards.back: adj. 逐渐的；渐进的；缓慢的
cards.hint: grad(台阶)+ual→一步一步台阶→逐渐
cards.example: The gradual melting of glaciers threatens coastal cities.

cards.back: v. 强调；突出；n. 最精彩部分；亮点
cards.hint: high(高)+light(光)→用高光照射→突出强调
cards.example: The report highlights the need for policy reform.

cards.back: n. 假设；假说；推测
cards.hint: hypo(下面)+thesis(命题)→在下面的命题→待证假说
cards.example: The scientist formulated a hypothesis and then tested it.

cards.back: v. 暗示；意味着；隐含
cards.hint: im(进入)+ply(折叠)→折叠在里面→暗示
cards.example: The data implies a strong connection between diet and health.

cards.back: adj. 固有的；内在的；天生的
cards.hint: in(在内)+her(粘住)+ent→粘在内部的→固有的
cards.example: There are inherent risks in any scientific experiment.

cards.back: v. 革新；创新；引进新方法
cards.hint: in(进入)+nov(新)+ate→带入新的→创新
cards.example: Companies must continually innovate to remain competitive.

cards.back: v. 整合；融合；使成一体
cards.hint: integr(完整)+ate→使变完整→整合
cards.example: The TOEFL test integrates reading, listening, speaking, and writing.

cards.back: adj. 内在的；本质的；固有的
cards.hint: intrin(内部)+sic→来自内部的→本质固有
cards.example: Intrinsic motivation is more lasting than external rewards.

cards.back: v. 证明…合理；为…辩护；对齐
cards.hint: just(公正)+ify(使)→使之公正→证明合理
cards.example: The results justify further investment in the project.

cards.back: adj. 合法的；正当的；合理的
cards.hint: legit(法律)+imate→符合法律的→合法正当
cards.example: The protesters had a legitimate right to demonstrate.

cards.back: adj. 边缘的；微小的；勉强达到标准的
cards.hint: margin(边缘)+al→在边缘的→边缘微小
cards.example: The improvement in performance was only marginal.

cards.back: v. 显示；表明；adj. 明显的；n. 货单
cards.hint: mani(手)+fest(打击)→用手打出来→显现
cards.example: Stress can manifest itself in various physical symptoms.

cards.back: n. 隐喻；暗喻；象征
cards.hint: meta(超越)+phor(携带)→超越字面携带含义→隐喻
cards.example: Time is money is a common metaphor in English.

cards.back: v. 修改；调整；修饰
cards.hint: mod(方式)+ify(使)→改变方式→修改
cards.example: The researchers modified the experiment to reduce errors.

cards.back: adj. 相互的；共同的；彼此的
cards.hint: mut(变换)+ual→相互变换→互相的
cards.example: The agreement was based on mutual respect and trust.

cards.back: adj. 负面的；否定的；消极的；n. 负数
cards.hint: neg(否定)+ative→否定的
cards.example: Pollution has a negative impact on public health.

cards.back: adj. 中立的；中性的；不偏不倚的
cards.hint: neut(既不)+ral→既不这也不那→中立
cards.example: Switzerland remained neutral during World War II.

cards.back: adj. 客观的；n. 目标；目的
cards.hint: object(物体)+ive→基于实物的→客观；目标物
cards.example: A good journalist must provide an objective account of events.

cards.back: v. 省略；遗漏；忽略不计
cards.hint: o+mit(发送)→不发送→省去不说
cards.example: The editor omitted several key facts from the report.

cards.back: v. 选择；决定；倾向于
cards.hint: opt→option的简化→选择
cards.example: Many students opt to study abroad for greater opportunities.

cards.back: n. 范式；典范；模式
cards.hint: para(旁边)+digm(显示)→旁边展示的模板→范式
cards.example: The invention of the internet created a new paradigm for communication.

cards.back: v. 感知；察觉；认为
cards.hint: per(完全)+ceive(抓取)→完全抓住感受→感知
cards.example: How we perceive time changes as we grow older.

cards.back: v. 坚持；持续；固执地坚持
cards.hint: per(一直)+sist(站立)→一直站着→坚持
cards.example: She persisted in her research despite repeated setbacks.

cards.back: v. 描绘；刻画；扮演（角色）
cards.hint: port(带出)+ray(射线)→射出形象→描绘
cards.example: The documentary portrays life in rural communities.

cards.back: v. 在…之前；先于；领先
cards.hint: pre(在前)+cede(走)→走在前面→先于
cards.example: A brief introduction should precede the main argument.

cards.back: v. 预测；预言；预报
cards.hint: pre(提前)+dict(说)→提前说出→预测
cards.example: Scientists can predict solar eclipses centuries in advance.

cards.back: adj. 深刻的；意义深远的；知识渊博的
cards.hint: pro(向前)+found(底部)→深入底部→深刻
cards.example: Reading great literature can have a profound effect on your thinking.

cards.back: v. 禁止；阻止；明令禁止
cards.hint: pro(在前)+hibit(持有)→在前面拦住→禁止
cards.example: Smoking is prohibited in all public buildings.

cards.back: adj. 突出的；著名的；显眼的
cards.hint: pro(向前)+min(突出)+ent→向前突出的→著名显眼
cards.example: She became a prominent figure in environmental science.

cards.back: v. 激怒；引发；刺激
cards.hint: pro(向前)+voke(呼唤)→呼唤出反应→激起
cards.example: The controversial policy provoked widespread protest.

cards.back: adj. 根本的；激进的；彻底的；n. 激进分子
cards.hint: radic(根)+al→从根上的→根本彻底
cards.example: The new treatment represents a radical departure from conventional medicine.

cards.back: n. 基本原理；理论依据；逻辑依据
cards.hint: ration(理性)+ale→理性的根基→理论依据
cards.example: The committee explained the rationale behind the new regulations.

cards.back: v. 加强；强化；增援
cards.hint: re(再)+in(进入)+force(力量)→再次注入力量→强化
cards.example: Positive feedback reinforces good behavior in students.

cards.back: adj. 相关的；有意义的；切题的
cards.hint: relev(举起)+ant→举起联系→与…相关
cards.example: Please only include information that is relevant to the topic.

cards.back: v. 修订；修改；复习
cards.hint: re(再)+vise(看)→再次看→修订
cards.example: The author revised the manuscript three times before publication.

cards.back: adj. 重要的；显著的；有意义的
cards.hint: sign(符号)+ific+ant→能发出信号→显著重要
cards.example: The study found a significant correlation between sleep and memory.

cards.back: v. 模拟；仿造；假装
cards.hint: simul(相似)+ate→使相似→模拟
cards.example: Scientists simulate climate change using computer models.

cards.back: adj. 大量的；实质性的；坚固的
cards.hint: sub(下面)+stance(物质)+ial→有实质在下面→实质的
cards.example: There has been a substantial increase in renewable energy use.

cards.back: n. 综合；合成；结合
cards.hint: syn(共同)+thesis(放置)→放在一起→综合合成
cards.example: The essay requires a synthesis of ideas from multiple sources.

cards.back: v. 终止；结束；使终止
cards.hint: termin(边界终点)+ate→到达终点→终止
cards.example: The contract will terminate at the end of this fiscal year.

cards.back: v. 转变；改变；变革
cards.hint: trans(跨越)+form(形式)→跨越形式→转变
cards.example: Technology has transformed the way we communicate.

cards.back: v. 削弱；暗中破坏；侵蚀基础
cards.hint: under(下面)+mine(挖矿)→在下面挖→暗中削弱
cards.example: Corruption can undermine public trust in government.

cards.back: adj. 统一的；一致的；均匀的；n. 制服
cards.hint: uni(一)+form(形式)→同一形式→统一
cards.example: The study requires uniform conditions across all test groups.

cards.back: v. 验证；确认有效；使合法
cards.hint: valid(有效)+ate→使有效→验证确认
cards.example: Further research is needed to validate these findings.
